channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tony Burke comments on migration and housing supply spark political debate
item.description: The article examines Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke’s recent comments on immigration and housing supply, made during an appearance on Sky News ahead of the release of Australia’s net overseas migrat...

item.title: Critics Question Proposed $300 Billion Reconstruction Fund Included in Iran Agreement
item.description: A wave of online criticism followed comments by U.S. Vice President JD Vance regarding a proposed Iran agreement that could allow Iran access to a reconstruction fund worth up to $300 billion. During ...

item.title: Senate Republicans Remain Divided Over SAVE America Act as Trump Continues to Push Voting Legislation
item.description: The article reports growing frustration among Republican senators over the continued debate surrounding the SAVE America Act, a conservative voting bill strongly backed by President Donald Trump. The ...

item.title: Russian Overnight Missile and Drone Barrage Kills 11 in Ukraine and Damages Historic Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra Site
item.description: Russia launched a large-scale overnight attack on Ukraine on June 15, 2026, firing 70 missiles and 611 drones at several major cities, including Kyiv, Kharkiv and Dnipro. Ukrainian authorities reporte...

item.title: Tom Nichols Criticizes Trump-Iran Agreement, Arguing It Leaves Iran Politically Stronger After the Conflict
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on criticism from retired U.S. Naval War College professor Tom Nichols regarding President Donald Trump's reported agreement with Iran to end a military conflict. According...

item.title: Senator Ronald dela Rosa Turns Over 20 Registered Firearms to PNP in Davao Following License Revocation
item.description: Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa surrendered 20 registered firearms in Davao City on June 15, according to the Philippine National Police (PNP). The firearms were turned over from a residence associate...

item.title: Andy Burnham’s use of Manchester’s music culture becomes a central element of his political platform
item.description: The article examines how Andy Burnham, Mayor of Greater Manchester and a candidate seeking a return to Westminster, has made music a defining feature of his political identity. His byelection campaign...

item.title: Republican Strategists Report Growing Interest in the 2028 Presidential Race as Potential Successors Position Themselves
item.description: The article reports on comments made by Rick Wilson, a former Republican operative and co-founder of The Lincoln Project, regarding the Republican Party's outlook for the 2028 presidential election. A...

item.title: New Book Details Internal White House Debates Over Habeas Corpus, Deportations, and Use of Federal Powers
item.description: MSNBC's Joe Scarborough discussed reporting from an upcoming book, 'Regime Change,' written by New York Times correspondents Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, which describes internal debates and dec...

item.title: Report says Trump appeared to react during White House UFC event after fighter made offensive comment about Michelle Obama
item.description: A report covering a White House Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) event alleges that President Donald Trump was seen reacting on camera after a fighter made an offensive and false remark about form...

item.title: White House Lawyers Reportedly Blocked Efforts to Suspend Habeas Corpus and Invoke the Insurrection Act
item.description: According to reporting based on the forthcoming book 'Regime Change: Inside the Imperial Presidency of Donald Trump' by New York Times journalists Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, several senior Whi...

item.title: Fox agrees to acquire Roku in cash-and-stock deal valuing streaming platform at about US$22 billion
item.description: Fox Corporation has announced a major acquisition deal to purchase the streaming platform Roku in a cash-and-stock transaction. Under the agreement, Fox will pay US$160 (approximately US$227) per shar...

item.title: Commentator criticizes JD Vance’s Fox News interview performance and communication style
item.description: A recent Fox News interview featuring U.S. Vice President JD Vance has drawn criticism from liberal commentator David Pakman, who described the appearance as an “embarrassment” and questioned Vance’s ...

item.title: Marcos orders Congress to convene special session on June 17
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has called on the Philippine Congress to hold a special session on June 17, according to a report by ABS-CBN News. The directive comes as part of the administration’s ef...

item.title: Profile of Alissa Walsh, wife of Matt Walsh, and their family life with six children
item.description: The article presents a detailed biography of Alissa Walsh, wife of American conservative commentator Matt Walsh, focusing on her personal life, faith, and family. Alissa, born Alissa Ann Linnemann, is...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif addresses National Assembly and welcomes progress towards a US-Iran peace agreement
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed the National Assembly on June 15, 2026, where he spoke about recent international developments and described the day as a historic milestone for peace. At the b...

item.title: How a Dog Named Pickles Recovered the Stolen 1966 World Cup Trophy in England
item.description: The article recounts one of the most unusual and memorable episodes in football history: the theft and recovery of the Jules Rimet Trophy ahead of the 1966 FIFA World Cup in England. Months before the...

item.title: Wendy Williams lives in assisted care facility while contesting court-appointed guardianship amid disputed medical diagnosis
item.description: Wendy Williams, the former popular host of The Wendy Williams Show, is currently living in a secure memory care unit at the Coterie assisted-living facility in New York. She resides on a locked floor ...

item.title: MS NOW analysts criticize Trump-backed Iran agreement, warning it could strengthen Tehran
item.description: MS NOW’s Joe Scarborough and co-host Jonathan Lemire offered a sharp critique of a reported agreement between President Donald Trump and Iranian officials aimed at ending ongoing hostilities and reope...

item.title: Eric Trump denies allegations of contacting UFC commentator about alleged fight rigging claims
item.description: Eric Trump has publicly denied allegations that he contacted UFC commentator Daniel Cormier regarding whether fights at a White House UFC event were rigged. The controversy began after an X user share...
